channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 13th July
item.description:
Littering on Street corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Narford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left for 8 days no attendance, 13th July
item.description:
Nobody has attended this vehicle for over a week?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Dunstan's Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive acacia tree immediately outside house, 13th July
item.description:
This tree has been pruned by you in the past as it has caused damage to the drains / pipes that run under my driveway , garage and into the extension. You did say before you pruned it previously that it was the wrong tree , too large for the street. The pruning that was done made very little difference and in fact the tree has grown even larger. It will affect my house insurance . I have been in the house for 33 years and would be most grateful if you could please look at this for me. You need to see it to believe its size and understand my concerns. Many thanks, Lisa Whittle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbastwick Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 abandoned Lime bikes, 13th July
item.description:
4 bikes on the East side of the junction with Kent House Road, on Lennard Road, and 4 bikes on the West side, on other side of carriageway on Lennard Road. There is also a Forest bike.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 Trollies of Dumped Rubbish, 13th July
item.description:
There is now 5 trollies of dumped rubbish at the corner of Meadowford close containing old carpet / flooring & bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent health and safety issue on Princess May Road, 13th July
item.description:
Overflowing rubbish and litter is completely blocking the pavement. This is an urgent health and safety concern: not only is it attracting rodents and pests but less mobile pedestrians are not able to move freely on the street. Needs immediate action.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Princess May Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lift is dirty, 13th July
item.description:
Please clean lift in 10-21 Tayside Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodfarrs, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 13th July
item.description:
Both sides of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Mixed fly tipping, 13th July

Blocking footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Palace Square, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish once again down sandy lane, 13th July
item.description:
I report this 10 times a year when people see rubbish dumped they think it’s ok to dump their rubbish 90%comes from the vehicles waiting to get into selco and toy other commercial properties in the road Please please can someone help I have spoken to my councillor who has helped This needs to be put a stop too once and forever Please help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lin, 13th July
item.description:
Lime bikes abandoned blocking the pavement - keeps happening in this location

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need a bin and fence is broken, 13th July
item.description:
When the elections was just about to happen the conservatives promised the world i asked them to address a few issues and none have been done, but they seemed very keen to get the vote and swore blind they would fix it, please put a bin on the corner here and fox the fence fed up pf smashed glass and rubbiah being thrown everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole on or about this location, 13th July
item.description:
Very sharp pothole caused damage to the rear axle of my car - it was very dangerous and I had children in the car so was very scary.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunts Slip Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New paving laid by builder does not match that of street., 13th July
item.description:
The new paving with regard access to driveway s has been laid as block paving. The rest of the street is tarmac so stands out and whilst looks good does not match. Is this because the rest of the poor paving and tarmac is to be relaid and will match what builder has done or a poor planning decision?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree needs to be cut back as the branches have grown and covering half of one side of the road and vehicles have to swerve to avoid the branches., 13th July
item.description:
Branches have grown from the base of the tree and cover half of one side of the road and vehicles have to swerve to avoid them thus making it dangerous if there is an on coming vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside1B Torbay Road, 13th July
item.description:
Spilt paint all over Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Torbay Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From just above the roundabout on Highate West Hill to the start of Millfield Lane., 13th July
item.description:
The road on this entire stretch of road is cracking and damaged. I put in a complaint previously and some attempt was made to repair the road but little was actually done, and once again it was not done well, like previous repairs visible on the road. There are many areas where the road dips up and down. There are many areas where manhole covers have caused uneven sections in the road. There are many sections of potholes and missing tarmac. It is dangerous to cycle on and the road seems to be patchwork and therefore has a lot of uneven sections on it making it dangerous and inconvenient to use. This (in my opinion) cannot be sorted (as has been done to a shoddy standard previously) by adding more patchwork repairs but would be better sorted by repaving large sections at a time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Highgate West Hill, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin blowing everywhere, 13th July
item.description:
This end of the path is covered in litter - please can someone go into the path not just by the bin to clean it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Comberton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much litter!, 13th July
item.description:
This area is getting worse and worse - part people, part basic care.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Falling wall, 13th July
item.description:
The garden wall is in a dangerous condition and falling onto the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
